text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 222 

PACE_MOS 

LABEL: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly 
(PACE) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PACE_MOS 

LONG NAME: PACE_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Managed Care 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual
